name: Cocoa Raisin Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend the butter and cocoa.
2. Add the applesauce and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt.
4. Add the cocoa mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
5. Fold in the raisins.
6. Spoon the batter into greased medium-sized muffin cups.
7. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
